Pizza Ordering Process.description: Guiding users through the process of ordering pizza, from selection to customization and final confirmation.
bot_actions: Ask About Pizza Details - Size, Toppings, Types
Provides Order Summary and Payment Details

Inquiry and Recommendations.description: Handling user inquiries about pizza recommendations and special deals, offering suggestions based on popularity or promotions.
